_purpose: FPGA pin definition for LLM-driven schematic DRC

VCCAUX_IO.desc: Auxiliary IO supply (can be 2.0V for HP banks)

64.drc_note: HP bank: all IOs in same bank must use compatible IO standards sharing same VCCO

65.drc_note: HP bank: all IOs in same bank must use compatible IO standards sharing same VCCO

66.drc_note: HP bank: all IOs in same bank must use compatible IO standards sharing same VCCO

67.drc_note: HP bank: all IOs in same bank must use compatible IO standards sharing same VCCO

84.drc_note: HD bank: supports wider voltage range but lower speed

85.drc_note: HD bank: supports wider voltage range but lower speed

224.drc_note: GT bank: dedicated transceiver pins, powered by MGTAVCC/MGTAVTT/MGTVCCAUX

225.drc_note: GT bank: dedicated transceiver pins, powered by MGTAVCC/MGTAVTT/MGTVCCAUX

226.drc_note: GT bank: dedicated transceiver pins, powered by MGTAVCC/MGTAVTT/MGTVCCAUX

227.drc_note: GT bank: dedicated transceiver pins, powered by MGTAVCC/MGTAVTT/MGTVCCAUX

power_integrity.desc: All power and ground pins must be connected
power_integrity.check: Every pin with function POWER/GROUND/GT_POWER must have a net assignment

rsvdgnd.desc: RSVDGND pins must connect to GND
rsvdgnd.check: Pin named RSVDGND must connect to GND net

config_pins.desc: Mandatory config pins must be connected
config_pins.check: CONFIG pins with must_connect=True must have net assignment

vcco_bank_consistency.desc: All IO in same bank must use IO standards compatible with the bank VCCO voltage
vcco_bank_consistency.check: For each bank, verify all assigned IO standards require the same VCCO

diff_pair_integrity.desc: Differential pairs must be used together or not at all
diff_pair_integrity.check: If one pin of a diff pair is used, the other must also be connected

unused_io.desc: Unused IO pins should not be left floating
unused_io.check: Unconnected IO pins should have internal pull-up/down configured in bitstream, or be noted

gt_power.desc: GT power rails must be connected even if GT not used
gt_power.check: MGTAVCC, MGTAVTT, MGTVCCAUX pins must be powered per UG575 recommendations

config_mode_consistency.desc: M[2:0] pin levels must match intended configuration mode
config_mode_consistency.check: M0/M1/M2 net assignments must be consistent with config mode (e.g. SPI: M[2:0]=001)

drc.desc: XADC dedicated analog input N. Leave NC if unused.
XADC dedicated analog input P. Leave NC if unused.
XADC VREFP. Leave NC if unused (internal ref).
XADC VREFN. Leave NC if unused (internal ref).
XADC VP input. Leave NC if unused.
XADC VN input. Leave NC if unused.
Mode select bit 0. Tie to VCCO_0 or GND per config mode.
Mode select bit 1. Tie to VCCO_0 or GND per config mode.
Active-low init status / config error indicator.
Mode select bit 2. Tie to VCCO_0 or GND per config mode.

drc.note: Reserved GND - MUST connect to ground

drc.desc: Pull-up during config. Tie to GND=pull-up, VCCO_0=no pull-up.
Config done indicator. Can drive LED.
Active-low program. Directly or via button to GND.
JTAG data out.
JTAG data in.
Read/Write select / SPI flash CS.
Config data bit 2. Required for x4/x8/x16 config modes.
Config data / SPI MOSI.
Config data bit 3. Required for x4/x8/x16 config modes.
Config data / serial DIN.
JTAG mode select.
Config clock. Master mode: output. Slave mode: input.
JTAG clock.
